post.title: You Are Here
post.intent_statement: Propose a single fixed marker for 'now' through which all content flows.
post.central_question: Where do you stand when you are reading time?
post.core_insight: One stable point of attention is calmer than a marker that chases the page.
post.body_html:
The dot is not a badge or a mascot. It is a you-are-here point — closer to a cursor or a recording light.

Content moves through the fixed dot. The reader's attention stays still while time passes by.

Stillness at the center is what makes the motion legible.
